name: Cinnamon Crinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined. Chill the dough in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
5. Press half a nut (such as pecans or walnuts) into the center of each crinkle. Sprinkle with the cinnamon and sugar mixture.
6. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until lightly golden. Turn off the oven heat and allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet before transferring to a wire rack.
